title: Sandpaper Number Match
description: A numeral recognition game where kids meet each numeral and tap the matching quantity.
learningGoals: Connect numerals to spoken number words
Match each numeral with a counted quantity
interactionModel: tap-count collect rounds with the engine's large numeral card as the visual anchor
feedbackModel: Each tap speaks the count with pop and whoosh SFX; completion gives sparkle feedback and a spoken quantity.

modes.title: Meet the Numbers
modes.skill: numeral recognition for 1-5 tied to quantity

modes.title: Bigger Numbers
modes.skill: numeral recognition for 6-9 tied to quantity

credits: Kaigani; emoji and text placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
